author: city
msg: [Photo] ive been getting this for a couple days now on my devices, what should i do to fix this?

author: Coffee Nodes
msg: have you tried to restart the app? reconnect to a different wifi ? disable VPN? restart phone?

author: tonyyyyy
msg: best one is to change the license

author: MikiRoma87 Miki
msg: Changing license shouldn’t change anything, restarting the app, perhaps try to unbind and rebind the device to the same license without the need of activating a new one

author: Rifat
msg: Maybe your ISP has blocked the URI. Try different internet connection. I also faced the same issue when connecting with a specific SIM.

author: Aryan 🍅
msg: Force stop the app and try again
